---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-layout">

<div class="about-sidebar">
  <img class="avatar" src="assets/me.jpeg" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt="Michael Lindon">
  <h2>Michael Lindon</h2>
  <p class="role">Staff Research Scientist<br>Netflix</p>
  <div class="social-links">
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-dW0PugAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/michaellindon">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/michaelslindon">LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="about-main">
  <h2>Publications</h2>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title">Title TBD</div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon &middot; <em>ERCIM News, Special Issue: E-Values: Statistical Testing for the 21st Century</em> <span class="tag tag-mag">Magazine</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2026</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.25971">Anytime-valid inference under outcome delay: A design-based approach</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon, N. Kallus &middot; <em>ICML 2026</em> <span class="tag tag-conf">Conference</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2025</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://proceedings.mlr.press/v258/lindon25a.html">Anytime-Valid A/B Testing of Counting Processes</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon, N. Kallus &middot; <em>AISTATS 2025</em> <span class="tag tag-conf">Conference</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.08589">Anytime-valid linear models and regression adjusted causal inference in randomized experiments</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon, D.W. Ham, M. Tingley, I. Bojinov &middot; <em>Submitted to JASA</em> <span class="tag tag-review">Under Review</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2024</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.14411">Near-optimal non-parametric sequential tests and confidence sequences with possibly dependent observations</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">A. Bibaut, N. Kallus, M. Lindon &middot; <em>Submitted to Annals of Statistics</em> <span class="tag tag-review">Under Review</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2023</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.14136">Design-based inference for multi-arm bandits</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">D.W. Ham, I. Bojinov, M. Lindon, M. Tingley &middot; <em>arXiv</em> <span class="tag tag-preprint">Preprint</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2023</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.08639">Design-based confidence sequences: A general approach to risk mitigation in online experimentation</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">D.W. Ham, I. Bojinov, M. Lindon, M. Tingley &middot; <em>Management Science</em> <span class="tag tag-journal">Journal</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2022</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.14762">Rapid regression detection in software deployments through sequential testing</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon, C. Sanden, V. Shirikian &middot; <em>KDD 2022</em> <span class="tag tag-conf">Conference</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2022</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.03567">Anytime-valid inference for multinomial count data</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon, A. Malek &middot; <em>NeurIPS 2022</em> <span class="tag tag-conf">Conference</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2021</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1906.06580">Adaptive variable selection for sequential prediction in multivariate dynamic models</a></div>
      <div class="pub-meta">I. Lavine, M. Lindon, M. West &middot; <em>Bayesian Analysis</em> <span class="tag tag-journal">Journal</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-entry">
    <div class="pub-year">2018</div>
    <div class="pub-body">
      <div class="pub-title">Continuous-time models of arrival times and optimization methods for variable selection</div>
      <div class="pub-meta">M. Lindon &middot; <em>PhD Thesis, Duke University</em> <span class="tag tag-thesis">Thesis</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>


</div>

</div>
```
